title: Realistic Item Drops
description: This datapack makes dropped items display with physics and rest nicely on the ground (using fun stuff with armor stands)!
body:
# Realistic Item Drops v3
Realistic Item Drops is a datapack which makes dropped items look and act realistically. The datapack uses armor stand magic to make dropped items look realistic. While it's inspired by the mod of the same name, the datapack runs server-side and doesn't need any resource pack!

Install the datapack into your world, and then run `/reload` to start it. To uninstall it, make sure to run `/function items:clear_all_items` before you remove the function!

v3 of this pack has minified it, and made it run so much quicker and easier than before, with other cool changes too!

This datapack works for 1.20.2 and above only. Older versions can be found here.

----

Join: https://discord.datapackhub.net
